en: A: May I ask if Tumi is home?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: May I ask if Tumi is home? *[Lisin] Please change the name to an ethnic woman.

ab: uka thithu itaun, numa sa akalawan uhu qa?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She's not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?

ab: apura’in, iaku Puni, tanaiwan sa pitaw.
en: A: Grandpa, I'm Puni, please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: Apin, Sihaw iaku, kilhim iaku ihun amapalhalhiqash.
en: A: Apin, I'm Sihaw, I've come to play with you. *[Kacaw][Mayaw] Please change the names of the women of each tribe.
A: Long time no see.

ab: ua, mathuaw iaku mangqtuqtu ihun. iahiaw mutaun mapalhinuna!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let's chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.

ab: uau~ mathuaw maniun a pushawil makanshuz maqitan iqilhaan.
en: A: (Exclamation) Your tea is delicious.
B: Let's eat fruit!

ab: ua! haya wa ribush a bunlhaz mathuaw tauduu ya riqazan.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: maqitan kaanin qa ribush a bunlhaz?
en: B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it's really delicious.

ab: pinintataiza ina kuntanlhuan a pania’an iahiaw munai kmaan!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
A: Okay, I'll go wash my hands.

ab: kaanuan! ata tu kayaw! antu ihu sa shahitan.
ch: A:吃吧! 不要害羞! 你不是外人。
en: B: Eat! Don't be shy! You're not an outsider.
A: I ate a lot, I'm full.
B: Eat! Don't be shy!
A:Well, it's delicious.
A: I have to leave now, see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.
A: It's late, I'm going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Take it easy!

ab: ua, unaiwan ihu naak a taun kilhnaqualh ya ishawanan.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
